zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Bonville於1425年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Lord William Bonville33歲，母親Margaret Grey28歲。她於1446年11月之前與Sir William Tailboys在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1491年2月14日在英國林可爾史爾吉享年66歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Bonville于1425年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Lord William Bonville33岁，母亲Margaret Grey28岁。她于1446年11月之前与Sir William Tailboys在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1491年2月14日在英国林可爾史爾吉享年66岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾諾斯 吉。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Bonville was born in 1425, in Devon, England, her father, Lord William Bonville, was 33 and her mother, Margaret Grey, was 28. She married Sir William Tailboys before November 1446, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 14 February 1491, in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Bonville est née en 1425, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Lord William Bonville, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grey, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Tailboys avant novembre 1446, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 14 février 1491, à Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Bonville 1425 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord William Bonville 33 und ihre Mutter Margaret Grey 28. Sie hat vor November 1446 in England Sir William Tailboys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 14. Februar 1491 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Kyme, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bonville è nata il nel 1425 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Lord William Bonville, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margaret Grey, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Tailboys prima del novembre 1446, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 14 febbraio 1491, nel Kyme, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a North Kyme, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bonvilleが1425年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Lord William Bonvilleは33歳，母Margaret Greyは28歳であった。1446年11月以前にイギリスでSir William Tailboysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1491年2月14日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアクイメで66歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアノース クイメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Bonville(이)가 1425년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord William Bonville(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Grey(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1446년 11월 이전 영국에서 Sir William Tailboys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1491년 2월 14일 영국 링코실르 키에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 노르스 키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Bonville nasceu em 1425, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William Bonville, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Grey, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Tailboys antes novembro de 1446, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1491, em Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Bonville родилась в 1425 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord William Bonville было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Grey, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Tailboys перед ноябрь 1446 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 14 февраля 1491 г. в местности ким, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности норт ким, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Bonville nació en 1425, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William Bonville, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret Grey, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir William Tailboys antes de noviembre de 1446, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1491, en Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en North Kyme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
